items.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.summary: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

items.title: Western nations warn Israel to end illegal settlement expansion, violence
items.summary: Nine countries including UK, Germany and France warn settlements in occupied West Bank a 'breach of international law'.

items.title: Economic confidence plummets in US amid Iran war, poll shows
items.summary: As petrol prices rise, new survey suggests economic confidence in the US is at -45, the worst since 2022.

items.title: French Open: Players accuse Slams of ignoring concerns as tensions rise
items.summary: The dispute between players and the Grand Slams reaches boiling point in Paris, but boycott restricted to media duties.

items.title: Putin optužio Ukrajinu za napad na školu. Najmanje šestero mrtvih
items.summary: RUSIJA je optužila Ukrajinu za napad dronom na školu u Luhansku, pri čemu je poginulo najmanje šestero, a ranjeno 39 ljudi.

items.title: Što se to događa na Baltiku? Rubio: Bojim se eskalacije
items.summary: NORDIJSKI i baltički ministri osudili su ruske optužbe o planiranju napada dronovima kao dezinformacije. SAD je izrazio zabrinutost zbog moguće eskalacije sukoba u regiji.

items.title: VIDEO SAD objavio nove NLO snimke
items.summary: AMERIČKO ministarstvo obrane objavilo je drugu seriju deklasificiranih NLO dosjea s izvještajima o zelenim diskovima i vatrenim kuglama.

items.title: WHO raises Ebola public health risk to ‘very high’ in DR Congo
items.summary: Provincial gov't in Ituri province, the epicentre of the outbreak, has banned public gatherings to stop spread of virus.

items.title: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
items.summary: President Donald Trump says he wants to send more troops to Poland, a week after his officials cancelled a similar deployment.

items.title: Rubio: Mirovni pregovori o Ukrajini su stali
items.summary: AMERIČKI državni tajnik i šef diplomacije Marco Rubio izjavio je da mirovni pregovori s ciljem okončanja rata u Ukrajini trenutno nisu u tijeku, iako je Washington i dalje spreman pomoći u olakšavanju razgovora ako se uvjeti promijene.

items.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
items.summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

items.title: Starbucks imao veliki plan s AI-jem. Sad od svega odustao
items.summary: STARBUCKS je odustao od AI alata koji je trebao automatizirati praćenje zaliha u kafićima, samo devet mjeseci nakon što je uveden u upotrebu širom Sjeverne Amerike, piše Reuters, pozivajući se na interni dopis.

items.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
items.summary: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

items.title: Bijes zbog videa izraelskog ministra. Aktivisti s flotile za Gazu: Zlostavljani smo
items.summary: AKTIVISTI koji su pušteni iz izraelskog pritvora nakon što su uhićeni na flotili koja je pokušala dopremiti pomoć u Gazu bili su zlostavljani, rekli su u petak organizatori. Nekoliko njih hospitalizirano je zbog ozljeda, a najmanje 15 prijavilo je seksualne napade, uključujući silovanje.

items.title: Ukrainian strike on dormitory in Russian-occupied Starobilsk kills four
items.summary: A Ukrainian strike collapsed a five-storey college dormitory in the Russian-occupied city of Starobilsk, killing four.

items.title: Britanac osuđen zbog prijetnji smrću Židovima i napada ispred sinagoge
items.summary: MUŠKARAC iz Londona osuđen je na zatvorsku kaznu zbog višemjesečne kampanje antisemitskih napada.

items.title: Why is Trump deploying 5,000 troops to Poland?
items.summary: Poland's right-wing president has welcomed Trump's announcement.

items.title: Marco Rubio visits India: What’s at stake with Trump-Modi ties strained?
items.summary: Rubio is taking an extended trip ahead of next week's Quad meeting of foreign ministers.

items.title: Turkiye shutters liberal Istanbul university seized in criminal probe
items.summary: Council of Higher Education promised to take measures to ensure Bilgi University students 'suffer no harm'.

items.title: Rekordan broj penjača u jednom danu osvojio Mount Everest
items.summary: REKORDNA 274 penjača popela su se na Mount Everest u jednom danu s nepalske strane, unatoč gužvama i sigurnosnim rizicima. Sezonu su obilježili i novi osobni rekordi te nekoliko smrtnih slučajeva.
